title: Health Educator
description: PPD is seeking a Health Educator to develop and deliver patient education materials and training programs for clinical trial participants. You will create educational content about study procedures, disease states, and medication adherence, ensuring participants understand their role in clinical research.
responsibilities: Develop educational materials and patient guides for clinical trials
Deliver patient education sessions via virtual and in-person formats
Create videos and interactive content explaining study procedures
Assess participant comprehension and learning needs
Collaborate with physicians and coordinators on educational content
Track participant satisfaction and education outcomes

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Health Education, Public Health, Nursing, or related field
skills: Basic multimedia or presentation tool proficiency

benefits: Tuition reimbursement for health education certifications
